title: Added --dry-run option to image prune
body:
Partially resolving: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27838

Need to merge with https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/843 

When adding the --dry-run flag to image prune, it will display all images about to be deleted without deleting them

comments.body:
Thanks for the PR! I see there's more discussion in the container-images repo that's currently going on. Once that's resolved, please 

1. use a go mod replace directive (then `make vendor`) to point this pr to your container-libs branch to test the changes there 
2. update the documentation for this new option
3. write a test [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/e2e/prune_test.go)
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
@zvenigorodsky, can you please rebase on upstream main? Thanks.
